meaning: 绾︾堪鍐呮柉鍫鍗楅潪(闃挎墡灏间簹)涓滃寳閮ㄥ煄甯俔
examples: The jet arrived in Johannesburg two minutes ahead of schedule.
He was in Johannesburg for the weekend.
Holland's Wesley Sneijder trains in Johannesburg.
The BBC's Milton Nkosi in Johannesburg says Mr Frederiksen was arrested last week following a tip-off.
Previously based at CNN's bureau in Johannesburg, Curnow led CNN's coverage of Nelson Mandela's death in December 2013.
